testcase.name: verifyInvalidLogin

failure.message: Expected error message not shown. Actual: Invalid credentials expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected error message not shown. Actual: Invalid credentials expected [false] but found [true] at com.framework.tests.LoginTest.verifyInvalidLogin(LoginTest.java:60) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

testcase.name: verifyLoginByUsingDashboardObjects
